title: Security: Uninitialized Pointer in `msm_parse_post_deps`
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
ioctl$MSM_GEM_SUBMIT will call \*msm_ioctl_gem_submit\* to submit gem. If \*MSM_SUBMIT_SYNCOBJ_OUT\* is set in \*args->flags\*, it will call \*msm_parse_post_deps\*. The \*post_deps\* is allocated by \*kmalloc_array\*[1] without \*__GFP_ZERO\* flag which means the mem
